Explore Membership →
ACTIVITIES

A Door to
Marine Life.

MARAZUL opens directly onto the living world of the Caribbean. From the pier, the sea becomes immediate: islands, open water, marine wildlife, sailing routes and private journeys, all within easy reach.

Book an Activity ← Back to Resort

Whale Shark Encounters

Seasonal expeditions
in their natural habitat.

During the season, private and shared expeditions offer the opportunity to encounter whale sharks in their natural habitat, accompanied by professional guides.

Caribbean Islands

Discover the protected beauty of Isla Contoy, the turquoise shores of Isla Mujeres and the distinct character of Holbox.

Book this activity →

Catamaran Sailing

Private and shared sailing experiences with snorkeling, music and time on the open water.

Book this activity →

Private Yacht Charters

Choose the yacht, the route and the pace, from island visits and swimming stops to private celebrations offshore.

Book this activity →

Sport Fishing

Private fishing trips with experienced crews, planned according to the season, weather conditions and preferred style of fishing.

Book this activity →

MUSA · Cancun Underwater Museum

Explore MUSA through guided snorkeling among submerged sculptures integrated into the marine environment.

Book this activity →

Journeys Through the Maya Land

Beyond the coast, private and shared journeys can include archaeological sites, cenotes and routes connected to Maya history and culture.

Book this activity →

Around Marazul

Close to More

MARAZUL remains naturally connected to the places that define this part of Cancun and the northern coast.

El Meco · Ancient Maya site The Church by the Sea Isla Mujeres · Direct access from the pier Protected natural landscapes Rafa Nadal Tennis Centre Nearby golf courses

Easy Access

Connected routes across Cancun and the northern coast.

Costa Mujeres The wild beaches of Isla Blanca Ferry terminal to Isla Mujeres Puerto Cancun · restaurants, shopping and marina Cancun Hotel Zone Downtown Cancun Cancun International Airport

Airport transfers and the future car rental service for MARAZUL guests keep every journey simple, direct and entirely your own.

Contact via WhatsApp

Fast response from our team.
